Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Garments worn beneath main garments, usually next to the skin.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Prenda que se lleva debajo de las prendas principales, generalmente en contacto con la piel.
Kledingstukken die onder de bovenkleding worden gedragen.
穿在主要的服裝之內的服裝，通常貼膚穿著。
Bekleidung, die unter der Hauptbekleidung, in der Regel direkt auf der Haut, getragen wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
